title: onobrychis kluchorica
intro: Onobrychis kluchorica, also known as the Persian clover or sweet clover, is a plant species within the pea family that is native to Central Asia and the Caucasus region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Onobrychis kluchorica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis kluchorica include tea infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
